meta.title: Revenue Health
meta.desc: Status badge with threshold logic — JSONata ternary for green/amber/red

compute.expr: computed_values.totalRevenue > 100000 ? { 'label': 'Healthy', 'value': computed_values.totalRevenue, 'orders': computed_values.orderCount } : computed_values.totalRevenue > 50000 ? { 'label': 'Moderate', 'value': computed_values.totalRevenue, 'orders': computed_values.orderCount } : { 'label': 'Low', 'value': computed_values.totalRevenue, 'orders': computed_values.orderCount }
